Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 2, 056 [loan][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

2 MA.NA 1/3 GIN₂ <<DIŠ>> KU₃.BABBAR ša₂ ina 1 GIN₂ bit-qa

(o 1) 2 minas, 1/3 shekel of silver which has one-eighth (shekel of alloy) in each shekel [of] Arad-Ištar, son of Bel-iddin, descendant of Kuri and Nabu-balassu-iqbi, son of Nabu-eṭir, descendant of Sin-leqe-unninni, (are) incumbent on Arad-Ištar, son of Bel-iddin, descendant of Kuri; Nabu-balassu-iqbi, son of Nabu-eṭir, descendant of Sin-leqe-unninni; Nabu-ban-ahi, son of Arad-Nabu, descendant of ṣāhitu-sattukki; Nabu-šum-uṣur, son of Mardu-naṣir, descendant of Kuri; Bel-ibni, son of Nergal-ipuš, descendant of PN and Nadin, son of Bel-le˒i, descendant of Sin-leqe-unninni.

o 22

[ša₂] ⸢m⸣ARAD—dIN.NIN A-šu₂ ša₂ m⸢dEN⸣—MU A mkur-i

o 33

u₃ mdNA₃—DIN-su—iq-bi A-šu₂ <ša₂> mdNA₃—SUR A md30—TI—ER₂

o 44

ina muḫ-ḫi mARAD—dIN.NIN A-šu₂ ša₂ mdEN—MU A mkur-i

o 55

mdNA₃—DIN-su—iq-bi ⸢A⸣-šu₂ ša₂ mdNA₃—SUR A md30—TI—ER₂

o 66

m⸢dNA₃⸣—DU₃—ŠEŠ A-šu₂ ša₂ mARAD—dNA₃ A lu₂I₃.⸢ŠUR⸣—SA₂.DUG₄

o 77

m⸢dNA₃⸣—MU—⸢URI₃? A-šu₂ ša₂ mdAMAR.UTU⸣—PAB A m⸢kur?-i?⸣ [...]

o 88

mdEN—DU₃ A-šu₂ ša₂ mdNERGALₓ(U.GUR)—DU₃uš ⸢A m⸣x-x [...]

o 99

u mna!-din A-šu₂ ša₂ mdEN—DA A md30—TI—ER₂

Bottom
b.e. 1b.e. 1

a-šar ni-is-ḫi mARAD—dIN.NIN

(b.e. 1) Where Arad-Ištar and Nabu-balassu-iqbi will pay the local tariff, they will pay together that silver of [2] minas, 1/3 shekel [...] at the fixed date of the payment.

b.e. 22

u mdNA₃—DIN-su—⸢iq⸣-bi i-na-⸢as-sa-ḫu⸣-ni

b.e. 33

KU₃.BABBAR a₄ [2] MA.NA 1/3 GIN₂ [...]

Reverse
r 1r 1

it-ti a-ḫa-miš ina a-dan-ni ša₂ KU₃.BABBAR ⸢iṭ-ṭi₃⸣-ir

r 22

1en pu-ut 2i a-na e-ṭe-er ša₂ KU₃.BABBAR na-šu₂-u₂

(r 2) Each bears responsibility for payment of the silver for both of them.

r 33

lu₂mu-kin-nu mARAD—dIN.NIN A-<šu₂ ša₂> mtab-ne₂-e-a

(r 3) Witnesses: Arad-Ištar, son of Tabneʾa, descendant of Nangariya; Ištar-iqiša, son of Amel-Nanaya, descendant of Pahari; Silim-Bel, son of Nabu-šaqu-ana-ili, descendant of Nagaru (and) Nergal-iddin, son of Iqbaya.

r 44

A mna-an-ga-ri-ia₂ mdIN.NIN—⸢BA?⸣ša

r 55

A-šu₂ ša₂ mLU₂—dna-na-a A mlu₂⸢BAḪAR₂⸣

r 66

msi-lim—dEN A-šu₂ ša₂ mdNA₃—ša₂-qu—a-na—DINGIR-MEŠ

r 77

A mlu₂NAGAR mdIGI.DU—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ miq-ba-a

r 88

lu₂UMBISAG mlib-luṭ A-šu₂ ša₂ mdAMAR.UTU—na-ṣir

(r 8) Scribe: Libluṭ, son of Marduk-naṣir, descendant of Gimil-Nanaya.

r 99

A mŠU—dna-na-a TIN.TIRki iti⸢KIN⸣

(r 9) Babylon, the month Ululu, 28th day, accession year of Evil-Merodach, king of Babylon.

r 1010

U₄ 28-KAM₂ ⸢MU⸣ SAG NAM.LUGAL.LA.[KE₄]

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

[m]dLU₂—dAMAR.UTU LUGAL TIN.TIRki
